title: Osmanli Liminali Alanlar Bakanligi

'''O'''.''' L'''.''' A'''.''' B'''.
'''O'''smanlı '''L'''iminalı '''A'''lanlar '''B'''akanlığı

[[File:ottomans.jpg|380px|link=]]

==Description== The Osmanlı Liminal Alanlar Bakanlığı (OLAB), or the Ottoman Ministry of Liminal Spaces, is an organization that deals with the exploration, colonization, and preservation of Turkic/Ottoman culture. The organization was initially formed in the early 1900s as a secretive imperial project under Sultan Abdulhamid II but continued in "exile" following the collapse of the Ottoman Empire. Now an independent entity, OLAB works towards preserving Ottoman/Turkish culture within the Backrooms, colonizing levels as they begin to discover the secrets of the Öte Diyâr. With Ottoman symbology denoting their presence and a strict hierarchy governing their ranks, they view their presence in the Backrooms as both a test and an opportunity—seeking to rebuild what had been lost and to make their legacy endure past the [[The Frontrooms|Frontrooms]].

==Hierarchy== OLAB is governed by a Divân-ı Liminalı (Liminal Council), a higher council drawing inspiration from the old Ottoman Divan. The head, known as the Bakan-ı Âzam (Grand Minister), is a religious and political leader who guides the group according to Ottoman values while adapting in regard to the Backrooms' harsh nature. The remaining ranks are as follows: • '''Bakan-ı Âzam:''' The head of the Divân-ı Liminalı ; serves for 15 ''Osman Years'' (Years starting from the 3rd of March of every [[The Frontrooms|Frontrooms]] year.)/until death; Replaced by next of kin (not just children; just the oldest living family member)
• '''Divân-ı Liminal:''' The leading council of the O.L.A.B.
• '''Koloni Bakanı:''' The leader of each outpost
• '''Sipahi Muhafızları:''' The armed militia of the group guard the outposts across the various levels.
• '''Bilginler Heyeti:''' Members of the group who are dedicated to research in the backrooms.
• '''Kültür Konseyi:''' Council responsible for maintaining Ottoman/Turkish culture in the backrooms.
• '''Ticaret ve Diplomasi Kolu:''' Members of the group who maintain relations and trade between other groups.
• '''Keşif Ocağı :''' Members of the group who do the exploration of new/pre-existing levels.
• '''Other Members:''' Members appointed for a specific task

[[File:OttomanFlag.png|380px|link=]]

==History== The Osmanlı Liminal Alanlar Bakanlığı (OLAB), or Ottoman Ministry of Liminal Spaces, started out as a secret imperial project under Sultan Abdulhamid II in the early 20th century. Inspired by rumors of strange disappearances and speculation of secret "rooms" beyond reality, the Sultan commissioned a small research department to investigate what he called the "Öte Diyâr" (Other Realm). It sought to utilize these mysterious areas for expansionist and strategic purposes: securing secret lines of supply, establishing bases out of the enemy's reach, and even potentially granting the empire a supernatural advantage. These ambitions would fall through after the realization that there was no concrete exit. The project was subsequently canceled with no further funding. However, the Sultan remained adamant until his death so that the exit could be found — it was not. Eventually, when the Ottoman Empire collapsed in 1922, the project lost contact with the empire but did not break up. Its members, now ''ex''—Ottoman scientists, soldiers, and loyalists, merely kept on working by themselves. They transformed over time from an imperial research faculty into a self-sustaining one, and not just of Turks but of those who share turkic roots (Turkish, Tajik, Kazakh, Turkmen, Mongolians, people of other nationalities who were half-Turks, etc.) as well as those who wanted to protect their culture. They would discover for themselves a new mission: colonizing the Backrooms in the interests of Ottoman heritage and safeguarding Turkish culture within this layer of reality.

==Accomplishments== ===Discovered Levels=== O.L.A.B. is a primary colonization group, so, it has not discovered many new levels. [ [[Level 142]] ]
[ [[Level 870]] ]
===Discovered Phenomenon=== Again, O.L.A.B. is mostly focused on colonization, and these phenomena were discovered intentionally — however originally encountered by accident. [ [[Phenomenon 15]] — Discovered by O.L.A.B. researchers in 1915.
==Outposts== O.L.A.B. outposts are divided into the CORET System, which is: Command Stations (C),
Outpost Stations (O),
Resource Stations ®,
Research Stations (E) and
Territorial Stations (T).
O.L.A.B.'s outposts are designated with Turkish colors. They are as follows: ---- Main Base: [ [[Level 385]] ] - '''[ Base Kırmızı ]''' (C):
The main HQ of O.L.A.B, located on a tower of the same name in the Rooftops zone. It is where the Bakan-ı Âzam & the Divân-ı Liminal both reside and where major decisions are made.
---- [ [[Level 232]] ] - '''[ Base Mavi ]''' (R):
A group of O.L.A.B. members who left the outpost on [[Level 385]] to search for habitable levels and established a base on [[Level 232]].
---- [ [[Level 416]] ] - '''[ Base Yeşil ]''' (T):
Set up to gather the level’s numerous minerals and metals for other projects.
---- [ [[Level 264]] ] - '''[ Base Sarı ]''' (O):
Set up as a living and research station to study the level's properties.
----
